description: Allowed Copilot Chat model names used by agents. Canonical source for model-floor lint. Update this file when model availability changes or models deprecate.

Claude Opus 4.6.notes: Highest-reasoning tier. Reserved for Orchestrator only.

Claude Sonnet 4.6.notes: Strong code generation at lower cost than Opus. Primary model for most agents.

GPT-5.4.notes: Strong structured output + tool use. Use for validators and deterministic subagents.

floors.rationale: A `model_floor` is the minimum capability tier an agent may use. Agents may be pinned above their floor but never below. Floor enforcement catches silent downgrades; ceilings are changed via PR review.
